title: Wire `command_upgrade` to commit upgraded assets
description: Update `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/init.py` to import `commit_scaffold` and invoke it at the end of `command_upgrade` when not in dry-run mode, with the specified dry-run notice otherwise.
acceptance_criteria: At the end of `command_upgrade`, non-dry-run execution calls `commit_scaffold(root, console)` after upgrade outputs are written.
Dry-run execution emits the dim `[dry-run] would commit upgraded assets` notice instead of committing.
The change does not add duplicate commit handling or bypass existing `commit_scaffold()` no-op behavior.

execution_history.summary: git commit failed: Command '['git', 'commit', '-m', '[bead] B-2074ff84: ready', '--no-verify']' returned non-zero exit status 1.

details.error: Command '['git', 'commit', '-m', '[bead] B-2074ff84: ready', '--no-verify']' returned non-zero exit status 1.
